---
title: "Banking Fraud Detection Analysis"
description: "Exploring fraud patterns, transaction behaviour, and risk indicators through an interactive banking fraud dashboard."
date: 2026-06-26
image: image.png
categories: [fraud detection, banking, analytics, dashboard, machine learning, R]

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: ../../styles.css
    page-layout: article
    toc: false
    echo: false
---

This project investigates banking transaction data to identify fraud patterns, suspicious behaviours, and key risk indicators. The dashboard provides an interactive environment for exploring transaction characteristics and understanding factors associated with fraudulent activity.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Key Features

- 🚨 **Fraud vs Non-Fraud Analysis** comparing transaction behaviour
- 📊 **Interactive Visualisations** for exploring fraud patterns
- 🔍 **Risk Factor Investigation** across transaction attributes
- 📈 **Transaction Monitoring Insights** to support fraud detection strategies

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Data Exploration

Use the embedded report below to explore the analysis:

<div style="width:100vw; margin-left:calc(50% - 50vw);">

<iframe
src="https://bankingfraudreport.netlify.app/"
width="100%"
height="1000px"
style="border:none;">
</iframe>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Key Insights

- Fraudulent transactions represent a small proportion of total activity but can have a disproportionate financial impact.
- Transaction characteristics show clear differences between fraudulent and legitimate activity.
- Certain transaction patterns appear more frequently in fraudulent cases, making them useful indicators for monitoring systems.
- Interactive exploration helps identify high-risk behaviours and potential fraud hotspots.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Resources

- [Live Dashboard](https://bankingfraudreport.netlify.app/)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ishitak22/30-days-industry-analytics/tree/main/03_banking)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Built using `R`, `Quarto`, `ggplot2`, `plotly`, and insights analysis techniques.*
